legal_description.value: Lot 45, SEVILLE PARCEL 3, according to the plat of record in the office of the County Recorder of Maricopa County, Arizona, recorded in Book 554 of Maps, Page 19; Affidavit of Correction recorded in Document No. 2001-0849180

source_note.value: Demo-only instrument illustrating entity-to-member re-titling pathology on PHOENIX VACATION HOUSES LLC parcel 304-78-367 (Lot 45, Seville Parcel 3). LLC-to-member Q/CL recorded approximately 22 months after the 2020 purchase (20200620456); some underwriters treat this re-titling pattern as a cloud until the member's interest has seasoned past 24 months. Recording number 20220100001 does not resolve against publicapi.recorder.maricopa.gov.
